stemHtml: An unidentified aircraft with no entry clearance strays into an FIR and is intercepted. The intercepting aircraft hears the phrase "AM LOST" which has been transmitted by the intercepted aircraft. What does this transmission?

options.a: The position of the aircraft is unknown.
options.b: The aircraft needs to divert to the nearest aerodrome.
options.c: The aircraft is requesting a squawk code.
options.d: The aircraft is in an emergency and needs directions.
